title: JIPMER Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
short_info: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website www.jipmer.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JIPMER Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Radiological Imaging techniques OR B.Sc in Emergency Medical Technology
qualification.details: Technician: B.Sc. in Radiological Imaging techniques from recognized institutes with 2 years of experience post essential qualification as Radiographer OR B.Sc in Emergency Medical Technology from recognized institutes with 2 years of experience post essential qualification as Medical Technician.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jipmer.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the JIPMER Technician recruitment is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Technician post at JIPMER?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technician post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Technician post in this recruitment drive by JIPMER.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the JIPMER Technician recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc. in Radiological Imaging techniques or a B.Sc. in Emergency Medical Technology, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the JIPMER Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technician position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of JIPMER, which is www.jipmer.edu.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of JIPMER?
faq.answer: The official website of Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) is www.jipmer.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this JIPMER Technician recruitment is JIP/EMSD/BHISHM/HR25-26(1).
